CREATE TABLE test_tuples (numTuple Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), divisor Int32);
WITH (SELECT (12, 24, 36) AS a_tuple, 6 AS a_divisor) SELECT tupleIntDivByNumber(a_tuple, a_divisor);
SELECT t.numTuple, t.divisor, tupleIntDivByNumber(t.numTuple, t.divisor) FROM test_tuples AS t WHERE t.divisor != 0;
SELECT (SELECT tupleIntDivByNumber((1, 2, 3), 1) FROM test_tuples) AS subquery_result;
WITH (SELECT (4.5, 9.5, 12.5), 4.0) AS vals SELECT tupleIntDivByNumber(vals.1, vals.2);
CREATE TABLE div_zero_test (numTuple Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32), divisor Int32);
SELECT tupleIntDivByNumber(numTuple, divisor) FROM div_zero_test WHERE divisor = 0;
